entries.prompt_text: Align {footnote block} left edge with body left margin
Center the content block horizontally between margins
Center the {report title} and keep section headers left-aligned
Drop {sidebar} box down to align its top with the first body paragraph
Left-align all body paragraphs in {Findings}
Left-align {conclusion} paragraph
Left-align {disclaimer text} at bottom of layout
Left-align the right-aligned paragraph in {sidebar}
Left-align text in {callout box}
Left-align the centered paragraph in {Recommendations}
Left-align {Executive Summary} paragraphs
Right-align {quote attribution} to the right margin
Place {author name} on the same line as {date}
Pull right-aligned {date line} inside the right margin by {0.1 inches}
Switch all justified body text to left-aligned
Right-align {page number} in the footer
Center {copyright line} between the left and right margins
Left-align {bullet list} text with {body paragraph} left edge
Center the {report title} between the left and right margins
Center the {title} horizontally between margins
Move {title block} from center to top-left alignment
Left-align {report title} with body text left edge
Left-align all section headings with the {1 inch} left margin
Center {subtitle} directly under {title} with matching horizontal center
Right-align {date} in the header to the right margin
Left-align {logo} and right-align {document title} in the header bar
Center {Findings} heading between the left and right margins
Left-align {Recommendations} heading flush with the left margin
Match the alignment of {H2 subheadings} to the {H1 headings} above them
Indent {H2 subheadings} {0.25 inches} from the left margin
Indent {H3 subheadings} {0.5 inches} from the left margin
Center the {running header} text between the margins
Left-align {sidebar heading} with the sidebar body text
Clear all manual tab stops in {Findings} and reset to default {0.5 inch} stops
Set a right-aligned tab stop at {6.5 inches} for {date line}
Set a left-aligned tab stop at {2 inches} for the {label-value pairs} in {header block}
Set a center-aligned tab stop at {3.25 inches} for {column headers}
Set a decimal tab stop at {4 inches} for {dollar amounts} in {summary table}
Remove the stray tab stop at {1.5 inches} in {body paragraphs}
Set matching {0.5 inch} tab stops across all body paragraphs
Set a right-aligned tab stop with dot leader at {6 inches} for {table of contents}
Clear the extra tab stop causing a double-indent in {paragraph 3}
Set a left-aligned tab stop at {0.75 inches} for {numbered list} labels
Replace spaces with a single tab at {3 inches} for the {To/From/Date} block
Set a right-aligned tab stop at {6.5 inches} for {page numbers} in footer
Set a left-aligned tab stop at {1 inch} for {definition terms}
Set a decimal tab stop at {5 inches} for {percentage values} in {KPI table}
Clear all tab stops in {sidebar} and use {0.25 inch} left-aligned stops only
Set hanging indent to {0.5 inches} for {bibliography} entries
Align hanging indent to the {first tab stop} at {0.5 inches}
Set hanging indent to {0.25 inches} for {footnotes}
Set hanging indent to {0.3 inches} for {numbered list} items
Set hanging indent to {0.5 inches} for {glossary definitions}
Remove the hanging indent from {body paragraphs} in {Executive Summary}
Set hanging indent to {0.25 inches} for {bullet list} items
Match the hanging indent on all {references} entries to {0.5 inches}
Set hanging indent to {0.4 inches} for {endnotes}
Set hanging indent to {0.5 inches} for {source citations}
Remove the accidental {1 inch} hanging indent from {paragraph 2}
Set hanging indent to {0.3 inches} for the {definition list} in {sidebar}
Match the hanging indent on {callout box} bullets to {0.25 inches}
Set hanging indent to {0.5 inches} for {legal disclaimers}
Set hanging indent to {0.25 inches} for {figure captions}
Center {caption} vertically in {callout box}
Match {caption} vertical center to {title} vertical center
Align {text box} to top of its column
Set vertical alignment to bottom for {callout box}
Set vertical alignment to bottom for {caption box}
Center {note} vertically in {callout box}
Center {image} vertically in {graph box}
Set vertical alignment to bottom for {note box}
Set vertical alignment to bottom for {text box}
Set vertical alignment to bottom for {graph box}
Center {logo} vertically in the {header bar}
Shift {table} to vertical center of its frame
Set vertical alignment to bottom for {title box}
Match {text} vertical center to {title} vertical center
Set vertical alignment to bottom for {table box}
Shift {text} to vertical center of its frame
Match {table} vertical center to {callout} vertical center
Shift {title} to vertical center of its frame
Shift {graph} to vertical center of its frame
Shift {logo} to vertical center of its frame
Match {image} vertical center to {chart} vertical center
Match {title} vertical center to {table} vertical center
Shift {caption} to vertical center of its frame
Center {note} vertically in {chart box}
Match {table} vertical center to {text} vertical center
Align the left edge of {chart} with the left edge of {body text}
Align the left edge of {table} with the left margin
Center {chart} horizontally between the margins
Center {image} horizontally between the margins
Right-align {logo} to the right margin in the header
Align {callout box} left edge with body text left edge
Align the top of {sidebar} with the top of the adjacent body paragraph
Align {divider line} left and right ends with body text margins
Center {table} horizontally between the margins
Align {figure caption} left edge with {figure} left edge
Align the bottom of {signature block} with the bottom margin
Center {KPI boxes} horizontally as a group between the margins
Align {two columns} of text so their tops line up horizontally
Align {icon} vertical center with {heading text} vertical center
